zh.lifeSummary: 當Ursula Pitcher於1560年1月5日在英國諾福爾可哈丁加姆受洗時，她的父親Edmund Pitcher35歲，母親Mrs Christiana Pitcher18歲。她於1580年5月17日與Edmund Devoroys在英國英格蘭諾福爾可哈丁加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1631年在她的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ursula Pitcher于1560年1月5日在英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆受洗时，她的父亲Edmund Pitcher35岁，母亲Mrs Christiana Pitcher18岁。她于1580年5月17日与Edmund Devoroys在英国英格兰諾福爾可哈丁加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1631年在她的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pitcher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly eastern and southern): from an agent derivative of Middle English pich ‘pitch’, hence an occupational name for a caulker, one who sealed the seams of ships or barrels with pitch.
Possibly from German Pitscher, from a short form of a personal name formed with Old High German bītan ‘to endure’, or bittan ‘to wish or ask for’, or from a variant of Pietsch .

variants.name: Pietsch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Christl, Claus, Erhard, Erna, Gerhart, Hannelore, Kurt, Lothar, Otto, Wilfried, Wolfgang.
German: from a Slavic-influenced (see 2 below) pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Petsch  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Pěč and Pětš: from the personal name Upper Sorbian Pěč, Lower Sorbian Pětš, (vernacular) equivalents of Peter .

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Ursula Pitcher was christened on 5 January 1560, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, her father, Edmund Pitcher, was 35 and her mother, Mrs Christiana Pitcher, was 18. She married Edmund Devoroys on 17 May 1580, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1631, in her hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ursula Pitcher a été baptisée le 5 janvier 1560, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Pitcher, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs Christiana Pitcher, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Devoroys le 17 mai 1580, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1631, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ursula Pitcher am 5. Januar 1560 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Pitcher 35 und ihre Mutter Mrs Christiana Pitcher 18. Sie hat am 17. Mai 1580 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Edmund Devoroys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1631 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Pitcher è stato battezzato il 5 gennaio 1560 nel Hardingham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Edmund Pitcher, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mrs Christiana Pitcher, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Devoroys il 17 maggio 1580, nel Hardingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1631, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ursula Pitcherが1560年1月5日にイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムで洗礼を受けた時，父Edmund Pitcherは35歳，母Mrs Christiana Pitcherは18歳であった。1580年5月17日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムでEdmund Devoroysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1631年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ursula Pitcher(이)가 1560년 1월 5일 영국 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Pitcher(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Christiana Pitcher(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1580년 5월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 Edmund Devoroys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1631년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Pitcher foi batizada em 5 de janeiro de 1560, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Pitcher, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Christiana Pitcher, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Devoroys em 17 de maio de 1580, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1631, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ursula Pitcher была крещена 5 января 1560 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Pitcher было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Christiana Pitcher, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Devoroys 17 мая 1580 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1631 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ursula Pitcher se bautizó el 5 de enero de 1560, en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Pitcher, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs Christiana Pitcher, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Edmund Devoroys el 17 de mayo de 1580, en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1631, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
